description_long: This object consists of a small stack of hardcover books, with two books featuring deep burgundy covers and two with green covers. The topmost book displays a sepia-toned, vintage-style photograph on its front cover, depicting a group of people in formal attire. The books have slightly worn, textured covers with visible stains and scuffs, suggesting age and frequent handling. The pages are thick and yellowed, further emphasizing their vintage character. The books are stacked in a slightly uneven manner, with one book propped open and leaning against the stack. The overall appearance is that of well-used, possibly historical or archival books, suitable for a street-side book market, park bench, or urban study scene.
description: A stack of vintage hardcover books, with burgundy and green covers, one featuring a sepia photograph on the front. The books are worn, with yellowed pages and visible stains.
description_view_0: A side view showing the stack of books, with one burgundy book propped open and leaning against the others, revealing the yellowed page edges.
description_view_1: A front-facing view highlighting the top book's sepia photograph and the layered arrangement of the books beneath, with both burgundy and green covers visible.
description_view_2: An angled view showing the top book's cover illustration and the uneven stacking of the books, with the green covers partially visible.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front cover of the top book, clearly displaying the sepia photograph and the worn burgundy surface.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a sepia-toned photograph of a group of people, likely from a historical period, dressed in formal attire. The image is slightly faded and has a painterly, vintage quality, adding to the book's aged appearance.
